data.title: BioNxt Solutions Secures $2.5 Million Through Convertible Debenture Offering
data.description:
BioNxt Solutions ( (TSE:BNXT) ) has issued an announcement.

BioNxt Solutions Inc. has successfully closed the final tranche of its non-brokered private placement of convertible debenture units, raising a total of $2.5 million. This financial maneuver is expected to bolster the company’s capital structure, potentially enhancing its market position and providing strategic flexibility for future growth initiatives.

More about BioNxt Solutions

BioNxt Solutions Inc. operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on innovative solutions and products. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange, OTC Markets, and Frankfurt Stock Exchange, indicating a broad market focus.

data.title: GreenFirst Forest Products Reports Q4 2024 Financial Results Amid Strategic Restructuring
data.description:
An announcement from GreenFirst Forest Products ( (TSE:GFP) ) is now available.

GreenFirst Forest Products reported a net loss of $26.6 million in Q4 2024, a significant decline from the previous quarter’s net income. Despite an increase in average lumber prices, the company faced challenges such as weather-related supply chain disruptions and potential tariffs on exports to the US. Strategic actions like the consolidation of shares, the spin-out of Kap Corporation, and a rights offering have improved liquidity and positioned the company for future growth.

More about GreenFirst Forest Products

GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. operates in the forestry industry, focusing on the production and sale of lumber and related products. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol GFP and is involved in the decentralization and deconsolidation of its paper mill operations.

YTD Price Performance: -14.40%

Average Trading Volume: 7,917

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $69.36M

data.title: First National Financial Announces March Dividend Details
data.description:
First National Financial ( (TSE:FN) ) has issued an update.

First National Financial Corporation announced its March dividend details, including a monthly dividend of $0.208334 per common share and quarterly dividends for its Class A Series 1 and Series 2 Preference Shares. The dividends will be payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025. The company also set a dividend rate of 4.908% for its Class A Series 2 Preference Shares for the next quarter. These dividends are designated as eligible under Canadian tax legislation, reflecting First National’s continued commitment to providing returns to its investors.

More about First National Financial

First National Financial Corporation is a Canadian-based company that operates as an originator, underwriter, and servicer of predominantly prime residential and commercial mortgages.

data.title: Soho House & Co Delays Annual Report Filing
data.description:
Soho House & Co ( (SHCO) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Soho House & Co Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ending December 29, 2024. The delay is primarily due to the company’s efforts to upgrade its finance Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system, which has involved working with external consultants to enhance internal controls and processes. This initiative has caused a delay in the Third Quarter 2024 10-Q (Quarter Report), affecting the year-end closing processes. The company expects to file the report within the fifteen-day extension period allowed by the SEC. Importantly, Soho House & Co does not anticipate any significant changes in financial results from the previous fiscal year. The notification of late filing is signed by Thomas Allen, the Chief Financial Officer, indicating ongoing compliance efforts.

More about Soho House & Co

YTD Price Performance: -29.86%

Average Trading Volume: 656,902

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.06B

data.title: Tenet Fintech Secures $3.6M in Private Placement to Fuel Expansion
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Tenet Fintech Group Inc. ( (TSE:PKK) ).

Tenet Fintech Group Inc. has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement financing, raising gross proceeds of $3.6 million with ThreeD Capital Inc. as the lead investor. The funds will be used to develop macroeconomic data indexes for its ie-Pulse platform, expand the Cubeler Business Hub to the U.S., and for general working capital. The financing involved the issuance of units comprising common shares and warrants, with specific conditions for warrant exercise and expiry. Additionally, Tenet issued common shares to settle debt with Altitude Capital Consultants Inc., aligning with Canadian Securities Exchange policies.

More about Tenet Fintech Group Inc.

Tenet Fintech Group Inc. is a parent company of a group of innovative financial technology (Fintech) and artificial intelligence (AI) companies. It offers various analytics and AI-based products and services to businesses, capital markets professionals, government agencies, and financial institutions through or leveraging data gathered by the Cubeler® Business Hub, a global ecosystem.

data.title: Canada Carbon Inc. Announces $700,000 Private Placement
data.description:
Canada Carbon ( (TSE:CCB) ) has issued an announcement.

Canada Carbon Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 35,000,000 units at $0.02 per unit, aiming to raise $700,000. The proceeds will be used for corporate and general working capital purposes. Each unit consists of one common share and one warrant, allowing the purchase of an additional share at $0.06 within 60 months. This move is subject to regulatory approvals and may involve a finder’s fee. The transaction highlights the company’s efforts to bolster its financial position and enhance operational capabilities.

More about Canada Carbon

Canada Carbon Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of graphite deposits. The company is primarily engaged in producing high-purity graphite, which is a critical component in various industrial applications, including batteries and fuel cells.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Lands’ End Updates CFO Severance Agreement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Lands’ End ( (LE) ).

On March 11, 2025, Lands’ End, Inc. and its Chief Financial Officer, Bernard McCracken, entered into an Amended and Restated Executive Severance Agreement. This agreement outlines the terms of severance if Mr. McCracken’s employment is terminated without cause or for good reason, including financial compensation, health insurance continuation, and outplacement services. It also includes non-competition, non-solicitation, non-disparagement, and confidentiality covenants, impacting the company’s operational continuity and executive management stability.

More about Lands’ End

Lands’ End, Inc. operates in the retail industry, specializing in clothing and home products, with a focus on delivering quality and value to its customers.

data.title: B Riley Financial Completes Strategic Merger with Cascadia
data.description:
B Riley Financial ( (RILY) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 10, 2025, B. Riley Financial completed a transaction involving the conversion of B. Riley Securities Holdings into a Delaware corporation and merging with Cascadia Investments. This led to certain Cascadia investors becoming minority stockholders in B. Riley Securities Holdings. The transaction, structured as a tax-free separation, allows B. Riley Securities to operate independently with its own governance structure and focus on middle market segments. B. Riley Financial retains an 89% ownership stake, while the remaining shares are held by employees and certain Cascadia shareholders. The move is expected to enhance transparency and provide stakeholders with the ability to independently value the investment bank, which has a strong history of capital market transactions and advisory services.

More about B Riley Financial

B. Riley Financial (BRF) is a diversified financial services company offering tailored solutions for strategic, operational, and capital needs across various sectors. Through its subsidiaries, BRF provides comprehensive services including investment banking, institutional brokerage, private wealth management, financial consulting, corporate restructuring, and more. The company also invests opportunistically and originates senior secured loans for asset-rich companies.

YTD Price Performance: -8.77%

Average Trading Volume: 2,105,618

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $130.2M
